---

So let's talk about how you're going to analyze your deals. When you're just starting out in real estate investing, it's important to break things down so they're more manageable for you so you can control what you know. This lesson does just that. Take something that can seem very complex, sometimes overwhelming, and breaks it all down into smaller, bite-sized pieces. Some of this you're going to hear as repetitive. It's important that you know. Know. The only way to know something is to repeat it over and over and over again until you're certain. In this case, those pieces are the four quadrants of real estate investing which we'll use to analyze your future deals. And you'll discover in this lesson by understanding these four elements, you'll be able to determine what is and what isn't a good deal. And if it's a good deal, you'll have the tools to move forward with a letter of intent and LOI and ultimately a PSA of Purchase and Sale Agreement.
